title: Autotype Pairing Data Schema
description: The app pairing data saved for Bitwarden's Autotype implementation must adhere to this schema.

major.description: The SemVer major version of the schema this data adheres to.

minor.description: The SemVer minor version of the schema this data adheres to.

patch.description: The SemVer patch version of the schema this data adheres to.

pairingTimestamp.description: When this pairing was created, stored as a unix timestamp in seconds since the epoch.

name.description: The name of the application paired.

normalizedPath.description: The normalized absolute path of the application paired, including the file name.

packagingType.description: The type of packaging of the Bitwarden client this pairing was made on. Informs the operating system and potential sandboxing requirements.
